reference: Dear patient, it seems you have a back sprain, which needs proper rest. Avoid running for a week and take painkillers like diclofenac twice a day. Then start gradually increasing running so that your muscles get adjusted to the strain.
text: Be your patience, please you have a back spring, which means top of reps. Avoid running for a week and take painkillers like you've spoken at twice a day. Then start gradually increasing running so that your muscles get adjusted to the strength.
